title: 18pc Multicolour Plastic Food Bag Clips Set - 4 Sizes - Reusable Kitchen Freezer Travel Camping Keep Fresh Snack Crisp Storage Sealer Pegs - by Ashley
features: These durable plastic clips are ideal for keeping an airtight seal on bags once opened.
They are great for snacks, freezer food, plus household bit & pieces.
Set contains: 3 Extra Large (13.7cm), 3 Large (11cm), 6 Medium (8cm) & 6 Small (6cm).
